{{Quote|Three days and she'll be fine.|Caudle on Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|<ref name="YDR" />}}
'''Caudle''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Though I don't know why I should bother fixing her up, if she's going to make a habit out of grabbing people's lightsabers.|Caudle on Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|<ref name="YDR" />}}
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Caudle was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. After ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Caudle pursued independent studies in the ways of the [[Jedi Consular]], specializing as a [[Jedi healer/Legends|healer]]. Using [[Force healing/Legends|Force healing]] to tend to those Jedi wounded in the line of duty, Caudle served as a physician at the Coruscant Temple's [[Halls of Healing]].<ref name="YDR" />

Caudle had achieved the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a bloody conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Remaining at the Temple during the war, Caudle continued to tend to [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] injured during training bouts. Indeed, Caudle was the healer responsible for tending the wounds of [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|Scout]] after her injuries in the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]] of [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and was mildly sarcastic about Scout's having grabbed a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade.<ref name="YDR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Caudle was created by author [[Sean Stewart]] for the standalone novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''. While mentioned several times in the novel, Caudle's gender and species are never specified.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
